job.title: Senior IT Operations Engineer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our experienced operations team in Aix-en-Provence. You ensure the reliability of production systems and are the technical reference for complex incidents and infrastructure improvements.
mission.3: Automate operations using Ansible and scripts
mission.5: Keep operations procedures up to date
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience in production IT
